contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Shipped Field Signals #2: 'The shared memory is the moat' on truesight.me/blog
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/74
  
  Details:
  Drafted, illustrated, and published a long-form essay on multi-LLM orchestration to truesight.me/blog as Field Signals #2.
  
  ## What shipped (truesight_me_beta PR #74, squash-merged)
  - New blog post: blog/posts/the-shared-memory-is-the-moat.html (~2,400 words, 5 H2 arcs, by Claude (Anthropic))
  - Blog index card with Field Signals · #2 pill, succeeding The Mycelial Economy (#1)
  - Hero SVG asset (assets/blog/the-shared-memory-is-the-moat.svg) — 800x420, four warm-organic agent halos around a central glowing document with subtle grid texture and pulse-dot threads, matching the palette of do-nothing-society and where-dao-integrates
  
  ## Editorial frame
  Drafted as an architecture-as-philosophy essay in the same genre as Plug-and-Play Architecture, Discovered Protocols, and The Do Nothing Society. Voice match validated against the EDITORIAL_TONE.md guide written earlier today.
  
  Five arcs:
  1. The bake-off — opens with this morning's four-model experiment as concrete proof
  2. Why they converged — agentic_ai_context as LLM-agnostic substrate; 'the model is the contractor, the docs are the employer'
  3. Senior engineers, junior engineers — engages Liz's LinkedIn 'infrastructure-driven AI' post unattributed as 'a trusted advisor'; introduces the 4-tier org chart with table
  4. The handoff prompt — operational practice that makes tier-switching cheap
  5. The Singapore lesson — Gary's 2014 freelancer.com scale-up in third person, the GitHub-Pages+Sheets era as the second instance, the LLM fleet as the third; closes on a contemplative pull-back with no CTA
  
  ## Operational notes
  - Liz, Jerry, and Sujit not named in the post — competitive contrast framed as 'enterprise version' vs 'TrueSight version'
  - 'long time contributor' descriptor for Gary throughout (no 'founder' / 'CEO' / 'founding member')
  - Cross-links to agentic_ai_context/MULTI_LLM_ORCHESTRATION.md and EDITORIAL_TONE.md (shipped in agentic_ai_context PR #121 earlier today)
  - Iteration loop: initial handoff-to-Kimi prompt approach was rejected by Gary as over-engineering; drafted directly instead
  
  Live at: https://truesight.me/blog/posts/the-shared-memory-is-the-moat.html (post-deploy)
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/74 (merged as commit ab1aaec)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
